## Summary
- Describe what changed and why.

## Milestone Tracking
- [ ] Linked issue(s) are assigned to exactly one GitHub milestone.
- [ ] Linked issue(s) include one matching `milestone:mXX` label.
- [ ] Linked issue(s) include exactly one `type:*` label.
- [ ] Linked issue(s) include exactly one `priority:*` label.

## Definition of Done Evidence
- [ ] Acceptance criteria in linked issue(s) are updated.
- [ ] Test evidence attached (logs, screenshots, sample payload results).
- [ ] Documentation updated when behavior/process changed.

## Validation
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Manual validation completed for impacted flow(s).
